messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "核心战斗与玩法体验" (Core Combat and Gameplay Experience) and contains no substantive body text. It can only answer high-level topic identification questions regarding fundamental combat mechanics and player experience. It provides no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types, and therefore cannot answer detailed, factual, or procedural queries.
